summary: Iteration 33: Verified critical bug fix for white screen crash when editing date/time on PENDING reservations. All tests passed (100%). The fix ensures updateBooking only sends fields relevant to current editMode, preventing Pydantic 422 validation errors. Reschedule email is triggered correctly when date/time changes.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: updateBooking in BookingsPage.js (lines 213-240) now sends only fields relevant to editMode
BUG FIX VERIFIED: datetime mode sends only {date, time_block}
BUG FIX VERIFIED: attendance mode sends only {actual_students, actual_teachers}
BUG FIX VERIFIED: contact mode sends only {contact_name, contact_email, contact_phone}
BUG FIX VERIFIED: toast.error handlers check typeof detail === 'string' before displaying
RESCHEDULE EMAIL VERIFIED: Backend logs show 'Reschedule email sent for booking' when date/time changes
Email sent successfully to contact email addresses via Resend API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for white screen crash when editing booking date/time verified. The fix ensures frontend only sends relevant fields based on editMode. Reschedule email is triggered when date/time changes. All edit modes (datetime, attendance, contact) work correctly.

verified_features.feature: CRITICAL BUG FIX: Edit date/time on PENDING reservation - no white screen crash
verified_features.details: Changed date from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-02, success toast shown, no crash

verified_features.feature: Reschedule email triggered when date changes
verified_features.details: Backend logs show: 'Reschedule email sent for booking cfc2e564-7ab1-4a9a-bc77-78f10259a207'

verified_features.feature: Error messages displayed as text strings, not objects

verified_features.details: Filled 15 students, 2 teachers - success toast shown
Updated contact name to 'Test Contact 1 (updated)' - success toast shown

bug_fixes_verified.bug: White screen crash when editing date/time on PENDING reservation
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: updateBooking sent ALL editData fields including actual_students='' causing Pydantic 422 validation error, and error handler tried to render Pydantic error object array as React child
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Frontend now only sends fields relevant to current editMode: datetime sends {date, time_block}, attendance sends {actual_students, actual_teachers}, contact sends contact fields. Also toast.error handlers check typeof detail === 'string'
